decision_commentary: Lead record captures all required fields (source_channel, category, received_at, summary, status). Carmen Valdez), location (La Paz, BCS), and key program details are immediately scannable. State_sync scored 3 per simulated run scoring note (no live Asana). Timing is 5: record created in the same session as inbound message. Decision_readiness is 5: all qualifying signals present for Marcela.
